loadedFiles.name: sample.java

vulnerabilities.description: The function `testDomain` contains a vulnerability associated with OS Command Injection (CWE-78). Exploitation can lead to compromised integrity, confidentiality, or availability of the system.
vulnerabilities.impact: Exploitation of CWE-78 can compromise the system's integrity, confidentiality, or availability (CIA). Explore implementation secure coding practices to remediate CWE-78 (OS Command Injection (CWE-78)).
vulnerabilities.recommendation: Review the implementation and apply secure coding practices to remediate CWE-78 (OS Command Injection (CWE-78)).
